sections.paragraph:
- Original: Ματταθά

- Transliteration: Mattatha

- Phonetic: mat-tath-ah'

- Definition: Mattatha = "givingness"

1. an ancestor of Christ

- Origin: probably a shortened form of G3161 cf G4992

- TDNT entry: None

- Part(s) of speech: Noun Masculine

- Strong's: Probably a shortened form of G3161 (compare [H4992]); Mattatha (that is Mattithjah) an Israelite: - Mattatha.
